title: rubus subhystrix
intro: Rubus subhystrix, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is known for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Rubus subhystrix are said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
